_comment: Example: lib_cwmscripture. Standalone library extension with its own release cadence.
_profile_comment: Profile drives the versionTracking shape — see templates/profiles/library.json in cwm-build-tools for the defaults. Override per-repo bits by adding your own versionTracking key below (deep-merged on top of the profile).

build._command_comment: command + outputGlob are read by cwm-release. command = 'cwm-build' delegates to the generic builder, which reads outputDir/outputName/manifest/scriptFile/sources/excludes/preBuild from this same block. cwm-release then matches outputGlob to find the produced artifact.

_versionTracking_comment: Optional overrides. Omit entirely to use the profile's defaults verbatim. Anything you add here deep-merges on top of templates/profiles/<profile>.json — lists replace, maps merge recursively.
